title: Marketplace Catalog-Entry Envelope Contract
description: SSOT JSON-Schema (draft 2020-12) for the unified Molecule marketplace catalog entry — the single envelope that lists ANY of the three artifact kinds (plugin / workspace-template / org-template) in the catalog, per RFC molecule-core#3285 (Phase 1, schema-only). The common envelope fields (id/kind/slug/name/version/source/publisher/tags/runtimes/tier/visibility) describe the listing; the per-kind `spec` is selected by a `oneOf` KEYED ON `kind` (kind:plugin -> pluginSpec; kind:workspace-template -> workspaceTemplateSpec; kind:org-template -> orgTemplateSpec). Because `kind` is pinned with a `const` in each oneOf branch, exactly one branch ever matches — the discriminator is unambiguous. The full artifact manifests live in the sibling contracts (plugin-manifest/, workspace-template/, org-template/); the catalog `spec` carries the listing-relevant projection of each (not the whole manifest). NOTE (Phase boundary): PRICE and ENTITLEMENT are deliberately NOT in this envelope — they are a catalog-layer concern (Phase 2), kept out of the schema-only artifact contract. `source` is a PINNED gitea source-contract string (`gitea://<owner>/<repo>[/<subpath>]#<ref>`) so a catalog entry always resolves to an immutable ref.

id.description: Stable catalog entry id (opaque; unique across the catalog).

kind.description: Artifact kind discriminator. Drives the `oneOf` spec selection.

slug.description: URL-safe slug for the listing (derived from the artifact name).

name.description: Display name of the listed artifact.

source.description: Pinned gitea source-contract string `gitea://<owner>/<repo>[/<subpath>]#<ref>` resolving to the immutable artifact ref.

runtimes.description: Runtimes the artifact supports/targets (canonical hyphen form; underscore aliases accepted). For org-template this is the union across its workspaces.

tier.description: Capability/cost tier 1-4 (for templates; absent for plugins).

spec.description: Per-kind listing spec. Its shape is selected by the `oneOf` below keyed on `kind`. Modelled as an open object here; the oneOf tightens it to the matching per-kind spec.

runtimeId.description: Canonical runtime identifier (hyphen form). Same SSOT enum as plugin-manifest.schema.json; underscore aliases accepted.

pluginSpec.description: Listing projection of a plugin manifest. Carries the marketplace-relevant subset: contributes summary, privilege, and the secrets the plugin requires.

contributes.description: Open summary of the plugin's contribution points (see plugin-manifest/plugin-manifest.schema.json for the full shape). Open so future contribution points list without a schema change.

privileged.description: Whether the plugin requires org-admin/management privilege.

requires_secrets.description: Secrets/env the plugin needs to function (surfaced to the installer).

workspaceTemplateSpec.description: Listing projection of a workspace template. Carries runtime/tier/models/plugins/env relevant to the listing.

models.description: Servable model summary for the listing.

plugins.description: Plugin source-contract strings the template declares.

orgTemplateSpec.description: Listing projection of an org template. Carries topology/size/defaults/composition for the listing.

topology.description: Free-text topology summary (e.g. `CEO + VPs + Managers + ICs`).

workspace_count.description: Total workspace count (sum over the resolved node tree).

composition.description: Composition style: inline list, name->node map, or folder-tree (`!include`/`!external`).

catalogModel.description: A model summary entry for a workspace-template listing.
